anchors.query: US-101 & Betteravia Rd, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Starting point - exit Highway 101 at Betteravia Road heading east

anchors.query: Betteravia Rd & Foxen Canyon Rd, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Transition point where Betteravia Road becomes Foxen Canyon Road

anchors.query: Foxen Canyon Rd & Santa Maria Mesa Rd, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Transition point where Foxen Canyon Road becomes Santa Maria Mesa Road

anchors.query: Santa Maria Mesa Rd & Tepusquet Canyon Rd, Santa Maria, CA
anchors.why: Transition point where Santa Maria Mesa Road merges into Tepusquet Canyon Road

anchors.query: Tepusquet Canyon Rd, Tepusquet Canyon, Santa Barbara County, CA
anchors.why: Mid-route anchor forcing router north up Tepusquet Canyon Road toward the mountain

anchors.query: Tepusquet Canyon Rd & CA-166, Santa Barbara County, CA
anchors.why: Junction where Tepusquet Canyon Road meets Highway 166 at the north end of the canyon
End point - returning west on Highway 166 back to Highway 101, completing the loop
